# llms.txt — Information for AI Agents
# Describes daniele.nucciarelli.it for AI crawlers.

# Website: Daniele Nucciarelli — Portfolio & CV
# URL: https://daniele.nucciarelli.it

> Personal portfolio and CV of Daniele Nucciarelli: physicist by training,
> cloud & ML engineer. Based in Perugia, Italy; works remotely.

## Who

Daniele Nucciarelli designs and runs cloud infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes,
Docker, Helm) and works on data analysis, anomaly detection and evaluation /
red teaming of LLM-based agents.

Current roles:
- Founding partner, Open Innova S.r.l. (software, consulting, coaching) — openinnova.it
- Data Scientist, Red Lynx Robotics S.r.l. (data analysis, anomaly detection, agent evaluation)
- Founder, Gestiscu (multi-tenant Django SaaS) — gestiscu.it, infrastructure & security

Education: BSc in Physical Sciences and Technologies (L-30), University of Perugia.

## Pages

- / — single-page portfolio (Italian; /en/ for English)
- /cv/ — printable A4 CV (PDF via browser print); Europass XML at /cv/cv-europass.xml
- /trasparenza/ (/en/transparency/) — how the site is built: no cookies, no tracking

## Contact

- Email: info@daniele.nucciarelli.it
- GitHub: https://github.com/nutc22
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniele-nucciarelli-663695412

## Technical

Fully static site generated with Hugo. No cookies, no analytics, no external
CDN requests. Content is bilingual (it/en).
